name: Salisbury Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, egg, onion powder, and salt in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Shape the mixture into 6 patties.
3. Roll the patties in flour to coat evenly.
4. Brown the patties in hot fat over medium heat.
5. Place the patties in a loaf pan.
6. Pour the mushroom soup and water over the patties.
7. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes, or until cooked through. Serve and enjoy!
